title: Sleepypack
description: Pack for a server Sleepyland season 5
body:
# General
The resourcepack was created for the Sleepyland server. He adds 3d models of swords to the game when renaming in the anvil, the totems of the server players will also appear soon. 
### How to install the resource pack: 
1. Download the new **current version** 
2. Download **optifine** or **cit resewn with ETF + EMF**
3. Open the folder with the minecraft version you need
4. Add the zip file to the **resoursepacks** folder.
# The list of renames:
1. **Gayka** - wrench
![Gayka](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/560d63ec3ad71f73d516a7221177f42f72d3feca.png)
2. **kosa** - long scythe, 
3. **RedSword** - Red Bloody Sword, 
![RedSword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be67310da626ef969d4d21d8914220498a35bad3.png)
4. **LightSword** - Red lightsaber, 
5. **AdventureSword** - Traveler's Sword from Genshin Impact, 
![Traveler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eee5513a572518ea202907a80934f3b88e92aac1.png)
6. **AdventureSwor** - frog Glove, 
![Swor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd14c5124c03d7cf3065cf65099f000afa741442.png)
7. **katan-zero** - Katana with a lightning blade,
![Derobot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ec9d58e4e25e628b1d2a763a4fb7aacf826012c.png)
8. **neon_katana** - neon katana, 
![neon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3917c203305b7419780140f629968e809110943.png)
9. **Guts' Sword** - Guts sword from berserk. You can look at the sword models in the attached images.
10. **Luffy hat** - Luffy's hat

**Sorry that not all the swords have images attached. More in new updates!**
